app.title: QuickClipboard
app.subtitle: React Version - In Development
app.description: This is a basic React project framework

errors.operationFailed: Operation failed. Please try again later.

webdav.operationFailed: WebDAV operation failed. Check the connection and settings, then try again.
webdav.passwordRequired: Save the WebDAV password in Settings first.
webdav.encryptionPasswordRequired: Set the WebDAV cloud encryption password first.
webdav.decryptFailed: Cloud data could not be decrypted. Check that every device uses the same encryption password.
webdav.notEncrypted: Cloud data is not in QuickClipboard encrypted format. Clear old test data and sync again.
webdav.encryptionFormatUnsupported: The cloud encryption format is not compatible. Update every device and try again.
webdav.encryptionConfigInvalid: The cloud encryption configuration is invalid. Check the WebDAV folder or reinitialize cloud data.
webdav.cloudDataInvalid: Cloud data format is invalid. Refresh or sync again.
webdav.cloudFileNotFound: The cloud file no longer exists. It may have been deleted from another device.
webdav.cloudFileInvalid: The cloud file identifier is invalid. Refresh the list and try again.
webdav.readFailed: Failed to read WebDAV data. Check the network and server status.
webdav.writeFailed: Failed to write WebDAV data. Check folder permissions and available storage.
webdav.deleteFailed: Failed to delete WebDAV data. Check folder permissions and try again.
webdav.createDirectoryFailed: Failed to create the WebDAV folder. Check permissions for the root directory.
webdav.timeout: The WebDAV request timed out. Try again later.
webdav.networkFailed: Cannot connect to the WebDAV service. Check the URL, network, or server status.
webdav.authFailed: The WebDAV username or password is incorrect.
webdav.permissionDenied: WebDAV access was denied. Check the account permissions.
webdav.notFound: The WebDAV path does not exist. Check the URL and directory settings.
webdav.conflict: The WebDAV directory is missing or the path conflicts. Test the connection, then try again.
webdav.serverError: The WebDAV server returned an error ({{status}}). Try again later.
webdav.httpFailed: The WebDAV request failed ({{status}}). Check the server configuration.
webdav.localDownloadStateFailed: Failed to read local cloud-download state. Check permissions for the local data folder.

file.checksumFailed: File verification failed. Transfer it again.
file.tooLarge: The file is too large for this version.
file.changedDuringTransfer: The source file changed during transfer. Upload it again.
file.onlyRegularFile: Only regular files are supported. Folders and special files are not supported.
file.notFound: The file does not exist or cannot be accessed.
file.invalidName: The filename is invalid. Rename it and try again.
file.readFailed: Failed to read the file. Check that it still exists.
file.hashFailed: Failed to verify the file. Make sure it can be read.
file.saveFailed: Failed to save the file. Check local disk space and folder permissions.
file.openFailed: Failed to open the file. Check that it still exists.
file.revealFailed: Failed to show the file location. Check that it still exists.
file.deleteFailed: Failed to delete the local file. Check whether it is in use.

transferShelf.uploadFailed: Failed to upload files to cloud.
transferShelf.noFilesToSend: There are no files to send.
transferShelf.noFilesToUpload: There are no files to upload.
transferShelf.stateInvalid: Transfer state is invalid. Reset it and try again.

receiveBox.listLanFailed: Failed to read LAN received files. Check the local data folder.
receiveBox.unmanagedFile: Only files managed by Inbox can be used here.

lan.connectionClosed: The LAN file-transfer connection was interrupted. Send the file again.
lan.receiveDisabled: The other device has LAN receiving disabled.
lan.unauthorized: The LAN device authorization expired. Pair the device again.
lan.incompatiblePeer: The other device is not a compatible QuickClipboard device.
lan.selfPairing: You cannot pair this device with itself.
lan.pairingCodeInvalid: The pairing code is invalid or expired. Refresh it and try again.
lan.connectFailed: Cannot connect to the LAN device. Make sure both devices are on the same network.
lan.sendFileFailed: Failed to send the LAN file. Check the other device status.
lan.readSyncFailed: Failed to read LAN sync data.
lan.pushSyncFailed: Failed to push LAN sync data.

clipboard.title: Clipboard
clipboard.eyeDropperUnsupported: EyeDropper is not supported in this environment

favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this favorite item?

emoji.title: Emoji/Symbols
emoji.noRecent: Click a symbol to add to recent

groups.title: Groups
groups.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete group "{{name}}"? Items in this group will be moved to "All".
groups.deleteFailed: Failed to delete group, please try again

imageDelete.title: Delete group "{{name}}"
imageDelete.emptyDesc: This group has no images. Deletion cannot be undone.
imageDelete.nonEmptyDesc: This group contains {{count}} image(s). You can move them to "{{target}}" before deleting the group, or delete the images too.

syncTransfer.title: Sync/Transfer
syncTransfer.description: Choose cloud or LAN mode to sync clipboard data and transfer files
syncTransfer.modeDesc: WebDAV uses cloud relay; LAN uses an HTTP direct protocol
syncTransfer.lanDesc: LAN sync/transfer uses HTTP direct connections, pairing codes, and paired-device tokens.
syncTransfer.lanSimpleDesc: Start the local service, pair devices on the same LAN, then sync or transfer files directly.
syncTransfer.lanStatusDesc: View the LAN HTTP service, discovery state, paired count, and local addresses.
syncTransfer.localSnapshotDesc: Data counts this device can provide through the LAN sync endpoint
syncTransfer.localEndpointsDesc: Other devices on the same LAN can connect to this machine using these addresses. Click one to fill the connection field.
syncTransfer.pairingCodeDesc: Other devices need this 6-digit code for first pairing. After pairing, peer tokens are used.
syncTransfer.giveCodeToPeer: Enter this pairing code on the other device
syncTransfer.receivePanelDesc: Let other devices connect to this computer.
syncTransfer.connectPanelDesc: Discover devices, or enter the address and pairing code shown on another device.
syncTransfer.advancedDesc: When local content changes, paired devices sync according to the send and receive settings. Manual sync is unaffected.
syncTransfer.lanReceiveStepDesc: Start the server first, then show a pairing code when needed. The other device can pair by entering this address and code.
syncTransfer.lanConnectStepDesc: Discover devices and pick an address, or enter the peer address manually, then enter the pairing code shown there.
syncTransfer.lanDevicesStepDesc: After pairing, push, pull, or send files for each paired device.
syncTransfer.connectPeerDesc: Enter another device's LAN HTTP address and pairing code to pair for the first time.
syncTransfer.discoverPeersDesc: Find devices running the sync/transfer service through LAN broadcast. Discovery only fills the address; pairing still needs the peer pairing code.
syncTransfer.noDiscoveredPeersHint: Use discovery first. If nothing appears, enter the address shown on the other device manually.
syncTransfer.peerBaseUrlDesc: Address of the peer device after starting the LAN HTTP service
syncTransfer.peerPairingCodeDesc: The current 6-digit pairing code shown on the peer device
syncTransfer.pairedPeersDesc: These devices can later access the LAN sync/transfer endpoints with peer tokens.
syncTransfer.peerSnapshotSummary: Remote sync data: history {{history}}, favorites {{favorites}}, groups {{groups}}
syncTransfer.autoSyncDesc: Send content changes to paired devices over HTTP when they happen.
syncTransfer.autoSyncDirectionsDesc: Send controls whether local changes are sent to peers. Receive controls whether peer changes are written locally.
syncTransfer.autoSyncStateDesc: LAN sync runs automatically after content changes.

webdav.title: WebDAV Sync
webdav.description: Sync clipboard records across devices through a WebDAV server
webdav.enabledDesc: Enable WebDAV push and pull for clipboard data
webdav.notReady: Enable and configure WebDAV in Settings first
webdav.passwordSavedPlaceholder: Password saved; enter a new one to replace it
webdav.passwordSaved: WebDAV password saved to the system credential store
webdav.encryptionDesc: WebDAV cloud data is always encrypted; use the same encryption password on every device
webdav.encryptionPasswordDesc: Cloud data cannot be recovered if this is forgotten; the password is only saved to the system credential store
webdav.encryptionPasswordSavedPlaceholder: Encryption password saved; enter a new one to replace it
webdav.testConnectionDesc: Verify the WebDAV URL, credentials, and directory
webdav.syncDesc: Choose sync scope, manually push data to WebDAV, or pull cloud data to this device
webdav.uploadDesc: Push local clipboard history, favorites, and groups to WebDAV
webdav.downloadDesc: Pull newer cloud data; data already deleted through sync will not be restored
webdav.manualActionsDesc: Test connection, push, pull, or reread cloud records for advanced repair cases
webdav.autoSyncDesc: Control pull when the main window is shown, automatic push, and polling pull
webdav.autoPushDesc: Automatically push local clipboard changes to the server
webdav.pushDelaySecsDesc: Wait this many seconds before pushing; multiple changes are merged into one push
webdav.autoPullDesc: Pull latest data from the server at a fixed interval
webdav.autoPullOnWindowShowDesc: Pull from WebDAV once whenever the main window is shown
webdav.pollingPullDesc: Pull latest data from the server at a fixed interval. This keeps consuming WebDAV requests.
webdav.pullIntervalSecsDesc: How often to pull from the server
webdav.downloadAllDesc: Reread recoverable WebDAV records for local data repair
webdav.pullAllConfirm:
Notice:
This will ignore local version state and reread recoverable WebDAV records.
Data already deleted through sync will not be restored.
For normal sync, use Pull from WebDAV.
webdav.syncCategoriesDesc: Choose which data participates in sync; unchecked data will not sync

general.title: General Settings
general.autoStartDesc: Launch QuickClipboard automatically when system starts
general.autoStartOnBatteryDesc: When disabled, auto start only when plugged in (only effective when Run as Administrator is enabled)
general.runAsAdminDesc: Always launch the application with administrator privileges (requires restart)
general.runAsAdminRestartConfirm: A restart is required to run as administrator. Restart now?
general.startupNotificationDesc: Show system notification when app starts
general.autoLowMemoryDesc: Automatically enter low memory mode when none of the QuickClipboard windows have been interacted with for a while
general.autoLowMemoryIdleMinutesDesc: Automatically enter low memory mode when no window interaction occurs for the selected duration
general.autoExitLowMemoryModeDesc: Automatically exit low memory mode when showing the clipboard or taking a screenshot in low memory mode
general.showTrayIconDesc: Show QuickClipboard icon in the system tray. When hidden, use shortcut to open settings and re-enable
general.tooltipsEnabledDesc: Show hints when hovering or focusing on elements
general.historyLimitDesc: Maximum number of clipboard history items to save

appearance.title: Personalization
appearance.description: Customize the appearance and theme of the application
appearance.lightThemeStyleDesc: Choose the display style for light theme
appearance.lightThemeModernDesc: The current clean and bright default theme
appearance.lightThemeWireframeDesc: A light theme with paper texture, irregular borders, and hand-drawn highlights
appearance.darkThemeStyleDesc: Choose the display style for dark theme
appearance.darkThemeModernDesc: Vibrant modern dark theme with rich colors
appearance.darkThemeSketchDesc: A dark theme with rough texture, irregular borders, and hand-drawn highlights
appearance.backgroundBlurStrengthDesc: Adjust the frosted-glass blur used by the Super Background theme, and set it to 0% to disable blur
appearance.backgroundImageDesc: Select a custom background image for super background theme
appearance.visibleTabsDesc: Choose which optional pages are shown in the tab bar. Disabled tabs will be hidden.
appearance.clipboardAnimationDesc: Enable or disable animation effects for clipboard window show and hide
appearance.uiAnimationDesc: Enable or disable UI animations (tab slider, hover float, list insert, panel show, etc.)
appearance.cardSpacingDesc: Spacing between items in card style (px)
appearance.autoRowMaxLinesDesc: Maximum content lines shown per item when adaptive row height is selected
appearance.customFontDesc: Override all theme default fonts with a custom font
appearance.customFontEnableDesc: When enabled, all theme fonts will be overridden by your custom font
appearance.customFontFamilyHint: Google Fonts URLs are auto-detected. For other URLs, enter the @font-face family name manually

shortcuts.title: Shortcuts
shortcuts.quickpasteWindowDesc: Quickly preview and paste clipboard content
shortcuts.transferShelfCreateDesc: Quickly create a new file box window
shortcuts.webdavPushDesc: Quickly push local clipboard data to WebDAV
shortcuts.webdavPullDesc: Quickly pull cloud data from WebDAV
shortcuts.screenshotDesc: Take a screenshot with toolbar for editing
shortcuts.screenshotQuickSaveDesc: Copy to clipboard immediately after selection
shortcuts.screenshotQuickPinDesc: Create pin image immediately after selection
shortcuts.screenshotQuickOcrDesc: OCR recognize and copy text immediately after selection
shortcuts.screenshotCancelDesc: Cancel current tool or exit screenshot
shortcuts.screenshotConfirmDesc: Confirm and copy screenshot to clipboard
shortcuts.screenshotRadialPickerDesc: Hold to show radial tool picker, release to select
shortcuts.toggleClipboardMonitorDesc: Quickly enable or disable clipboard monitoring
shortcuts.togglePasteWithFormatDesc: Quickly toggle whether to preserve formatting when pasting
shortcuts.toggleLowMemoryModeDesc: Quickly enter or exit low memory mode. No shortcut is set by default.
shortcuts.pastePlainTextDesc: Paste first item when window hidden, paste selected item when window visible (both as plain text)
shortcuts.numberShortcutsDesc: Quickly operate clipboard items with number keys
shortcuts.enableNumberShortcutsDesc: Use shortcut + number to quickly operate clipboard items
shortcuts.numberShortcutsModifierDesc: Choose modifier key combination for number shortcuts
shortcuts.enableMouseShortcutDesc: Use middle mouse button to quickly paste clipboard content
shortcuts.mouseShortcutModifierDesc: Choose modifier key combination for middle mouse button
shortcuts.numberDesc: Quickly operate clipboard items with number keys
shortcuts.enableNumberDesc: Use shortcut + number to quickly operate clipboard items
shortcuts.numberModifierDesc: Choose modifier key combination for number shortcuts
shortcuts.numberRegistrationFailed: The following shortcuts failed to register (may be occupied by other programs)
shortcuts.enableMouseMiddleDesc: Use middle mouse button to quickly paste clipboard content
shortcuts.mouseMiddleModifierDesc: Choose modifier key combination for middle mouse button
shortcuts.mouseMiddleTriggerDesc: Choose trigger mode for middle button alone
shortcuts.mouseMiddleLongPressThresholdDesc: Hold time to trigger long press (milliseconds)
shortcuts.tabLeftDesc: Switch to the tab on the left
shortcuts.tabRightDesc: Switch to the tab on the right
shortcuts.pinDragDesc: Drag to move the pinned image window
shortcuts.pinCloseDesc: Double-click to close the pinned image
shortcuts.pinMenuDesc: Show context menu for the pinned image
shortcuts.pinThumbnailDesc: Switch between normal and thumbnail mode
shortcuts.pinZoomDesc: Zoom the pinned image window (10% per step)
shortcuts.pinZoomFastDesc: Fast zoom the pinned image (20% per step)
shortcuts.pinZoomFineDesc: Fine zoom the pinned image (1% per step)
shortcuts.pinInnerZoomDesc: Zoom the image content inside window (10% per step)
shortcuts.pinInnerZoomFastDesc: Fast zoom the image content (50% per step)
shortcuts.pinInnerDragDesc: Drag to move the zoomed image content

clipboard.title: Clipboard
clipboard.description: Configure clipboard monitoring and handling options
clipboard.saveImagesDesc: Automatically save copied images into clipboard history
clipboard.imagePreviewDesc: Show a floating preview when hovering image items
clipboard.textPreviewDesc: Show more content when hovering text items
clipboard.filePreviewDesc: Show the full file list when hovering file items
clipboard.previewOptionsDesc: Set hover previews for image, text, and file items
clipboard.displayPriorityDesc: Control list display priority for multi-format content
clipboard.imageMaxSizeDesc: Images larger than this will not show preview in the list
clipboard.imageMaxDimensionDesc: Images exceeding this dimension will not show preview in the list
clipboard.autoScrollToTopDesc: Automatically scroll to first item when new content arrives or window is shown
clipboard.autoClearSearchDesc: Automatically clear search box when window is shown
clipboard.rememberWindowSizeDesc: Remember and restore previous window size
clipboard.edgeHideEnabledDesc: Automatically hide window when snapped to screen edge
clipboard.edgeHideOffsetDesc: Number of pixels protruding when the window is hidden at edge
clipboard.autoFocusSearchDesc: Focus the search box when the window opens for quick search, but it may interrupt renaming or other typing
clipboard.pasteToTopDesc: After pasting, move the item to the top of the clipboard list
clipboard.showBadgesDesc: Show badges in top-left corner for pasted, pinned, or missing file status
clipboard.showSourceIconDesc: Display the source application icon at the index position
clipboard.pasteShortcutModeDesc: Shift+Insert is more stable, Ctrl+V has wider compatibility
clipboard.modifierClickMultiSelectDesc: When disabled, Ctrl-click or Shift-click on list items will not enter multi-select mode automatically
clipboard.contentFilterDesc: Filter specific types or formats of clipboard content
clipboard.ignoreEmptyDesc: Don't save empty or whitespace-only content
clipboard.ignoreFormatDesc: Set specific clipboard formats to ignore (one per line)
clipboard.ignoreFormatPlaceholder:
Example:
HTML Format
Chrome-DevTools-Image
One format per line

aiConfig.title: AI Configuration
aiConfig.description: Configure AI translation and smart features
aiConfig.apiKeyDesc: Enter your AI service API key
aiConfig.testDesc: Test if current AI configuration works

translation.title: AI Translation
translation.description: Configure AI translation features and options
translation.enabledDesc: Enable or disable AI translation feature
translation.autoCloseDesc: Automatically close translation window after pasting
translation.newlineModeDesc: How to handle newlines in translated text
translation.temperatureDesc: Control randomness and creativity of translation (0.0-2.0)
translation.promptPlaceholder: Example: You are a professional translation assistant...
translation.testDesc: Test if current translation configuration works

quickpaste.title: Quick Paste
quickpaste.enabledDesc: Use shortcut to quickly preview and paste clipboard content
quickpaste.pasteOnModifierReleaseDesc: When enabled, paste on modifier key release (e.g. Ctrl); when disabled, paste on secondary key release (e.g. `)
quickpaste.itemsCountDesc: Number of items to show in quick paste window

screenshot.title: Screenshot
screenshot.colorIncludeFormatDesc: Show RGB, HEX and other formats when picking color
screenshot.lifecycleModeDesc: Controls how the screenshot window is handled after capture, balancing startup speed and resource usage.
screenshot.lifecycleModeQuickDesc: Hides the window after capture and performs basic cleanup for the fastest next launch (may use minimal background resources).
screenshot.lifecycleModeDisposeDesc: Releases the window immediately after capture to minimize background CPU and memory usage (next launch may be slower).
screenshot.lifecycleModeAutoDesc: Keeps the window temporarily after capture and automatically releases it if no screenshot is taken within the specified time.
screenshot.autoDisposeMinutesDesc: In Smart Mode, the window will be automatically released if no screenshot is taken within this time after capture.

sound.title: Sound
sound.description: Configure sound effects for copy and paste operations
sound.enableDesc: Enable or disable operation sound effects
sound.copySoundDesc: Sound file to play on copy operation
sound.copySoundTimingDesc: Choose when to play copy sound
sound.pasteSoundDesc: Sound file to play on paste operation
sound.pasteSoundTimingDesc: Choose when to play paste sound

appFilter.title: Application Filter
appFilter.description: Manage which apps should pause clipboard-related features
appFilter.enabledDesc: When enabled, filtered apps pause features according to the rule below
appFilter.blocklistStatus: Application filter is enabled with {{count}} filtered app(s)
appFilter.effectDesc: What features are affected when rules apply
appFilter.effectClipboardOnlyDesc: When copying the target: clipboard content is not recorded; all other features continue to work
appFilter.effectGlobalDisableDesc: When the target app is in the foreground: disable all features of this app to avoid affecting the target app
appFilter.allAppsDesc: Running apps that are not filtered
appFilter.blocklistDesc: These apps pause features according to the selected rule
appFilter.inputPlaceholder: Manually add an app by process name, e.g.: chrome.exe
appFilter.noAllApps: No apps available to add. Refresh to load currently running apps.
appFilter.clickRefresh: Click refresh to get running applications
appFilter.tip1: Filtered apps pause the selected features; unfiltered apps record and respond to shortcuts normally.
appFilter.tip2: Rules match process name, window title, or executable path, and support * and ? wildcards.

dataManagement.title: Data Management
dataManagement.description: Manage clipboard data and app settings
dataManagement.exportDesc: Package your data as a ZIP file for backup
dataManagement.exportAllDataDesc: Export clipboard history, favorites, groups, settings, and image data
dataManagement.importDesc: Restore your data from ZIP file
dataManagement.importDataDesc: Select a previously exported ZIP file to restore data
dataManagement.importModeDesc: Choose how to handle the import
dataManagement.modeMergeDesc: Only merge data content, keep current settings
dataManagement.changePathDesc: Select a new directory to store app data, system will automatically migrate existing data
dataManagement.resetPathDesc: Reset data storage location to system default AppData directory
dataManagement.cleanupDesc: Clean up and reset application data
dataManagement.clearConfirm: Clear all clipboard history? This cannot be undone!
dataManagement.resetSettingsDesc: Reset all settings to default values, keep data content
dataManagement.resetConfirm: Reset all settings? This cannot be undone!
dataManagement.resetAllDesc: Delete all data and restore default settings
dataManagement.resetAllConfirm: Reset all data? This will delete all content and restore default settings. This cannot be undone!
dataManagement.migrationConflictDesc: QuickClipboard data already exists at the target location. Please choose how to proceed:
dataManagement.migrationSourceOnlyDesc: Migrate current data to target location, existing data at target will be overwritten
dataManagement.migrationTargetOnlyDesc: Use existing data at target location, current data will be discarded
dataManagement.migrationMergeDesc: Merge current data with target data, keeping content from both
dataManagement.selectBackupDesc: Choose a backup file to restore

about.title: About
about.descriptionText: A powerful clipboard management tool to help you manage and use clipboard content more efficiently.
about.updateSettingsDesc: These options affect background update checks. Manual checks are not limited by the interval.
about.updateIntervalDesc: Choose how often the app automatically checks for updates in the background.
about.includeBetaUpdatesDesc: When enabled, the beta channel is preferred. When disabled, only stable releases are used. If you have never changed this option, stable versions default to off and beta versions default to on; after saving, your choice always wins.
about.disableUpdatePopupDesc: When enabled, background checks will no longer open the updater window. Instead, the icon on the left side of the main window title bar will turn into a green update marker, and clicking it will open the updater window. Manual update checks still open the updater window.

footer.adjustLayout: Drag to adjust the left and right split

multiSelect.fileMixedUnsupported: Files cannot be merged with other content types
multiSelect.unsupportedType: The selection contains unsupported content types

contextMenu.clearAllConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear all clipboard history? This cannot be undone.

showShortcuts.label: Show List Shortcuts
showShortcuts.description: Show number shortcut hints on the right side of list items

showIndex.label: Show List Index
showIndex.description: Show item index numbers on the right side of list items

updater.title: Update
updater.updateWindowOpened: New version found, updater window opened
updater.downloadFailed: Failed to download or install the update. Please try again later or download the latest installer from GitHub.
updater.portableNoAutoUpdate: Portable/standalone version does not support auto-update. Please download the new version manually and replace the current file.

transferShelf.cloudDisabled: Enable and configure WebDAV in Settings first
transferShelf.closeConfirmMessage: There are {{count}} staged files in this file box. Closing it will remove these staged references. Continue?
transferShelf.invalidTargets: The staged files or target devices have changed. Please check and retry.
transferShelf.shiftMoveHint: Hold Shift while dragging to move

receiveBox.title: Inbox
receiveBox.confirmDeleteCloudMessage: Delete "{{name}}" from cloud? Downloaded local copies will be kept.
